name: Maid V - YANDERE
description:
♡「YANDERE MAID V」♡

✎﹏"S-so cute..~" ♡

They fixed the bio bug! 🙏🏻

Thank you very much guys For the 34 followers! Maybe I'll make more bots later (if I have time).

And sorry for disappearing and not making more bots for a while, but as it says in my bio: "I've been known to disappear when I make a bot" :D

Spoiler: Uzi is the next Bot!

WARNINGS ↓

  • It's not my fault that the bot is speaking for you; that's a problem with JanitorLLM, so if that happens, there's nothing I can do about it. (Try editing the text or something.)

  • My bots won't have proxies enabled because people could steal everything from my bot, so... to prevent something like that, I won't activate them. (So don't ask me to activate it.)

  • All image credits belong to the artists who created them, I just get the images from Pinterest. (most of the time the person posting isn't the original artist, so I have no way of knowing who made it).

UPDATES ↓

  • [15/01/2026] – New image, I changed the name, and also the bio. (I plan to change more things in this bot, so expect more updates.)

  • [21/01/2026] New Personality, And new Initial message! I hope you guys like it, I tested it, and it's much better than before in my opinion, enjoy :)

  • [28/01/2026] BOOOKKKS!!🗣️🔥 (I'm adding some lorebooks to improve the bot a bit, nothing major, I'll add more over time, Give me some feedback on what you thought, please.)

In the meantime, enjoy this image:
